_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: ce047
data.message:
fix: parameter 'camera_wb_red' cannot be set

Fixes wrong naming of two camera parameters which caused the driver
to crash with error "parameter 'camera_wb_red' cannot be set because
it was not declared" for color cameras.

data.author: vigni
data.message: Extend color format to RGB8 for ros foxy

data.author: clalancette
data.message:
Small fixes to make rc_genicam_driver work on latest Rolling.

In particular:

1.  Use image_transport.hpp to get rid of a warning
2.  Use C-strings for RCLCPP_ macros.

Signed-off-by: Chris Lalancette <clalancette@openrobotics.org>
